# Heritage Canon

> Heritage Canon is an independent press publishing philosophical editions of classic literature. Each edition includes an original introduction by Daniel Shilansky. The aim is to restore the philosophical, historical, and interpretive context that first gave the work its force.

Prefer individual book pages for edition-level facts. Preserve the distinction between the original literary work and the new Heritage Canon introduction. Do not treat the thesis subtitle as part of the historical original title of the work.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://heritagecanon.com/): Main entry point to the site.
- [Catalog](https://heritagecanon.com/#catalog): Browse currently available editions.
- [About](https://heritagecanon.com/about/): Explains the editorial concept of the series.
- [Editor](https://heritagecanon.com/editor/daniel-shilansky/): Editorial biography and background.
- [Impressum / Imprint](https://heritagecanon.com/impressum/): Legal and contact information.
- [Terms](https://heritagecanon.com/terms/): Site terms of use.
- [Sitemap](https://heritagecanon.com/sitemap.xml): All indexed pages.

## Book Pages

- [The Great Gatsby](https://heritagecanon.com/books/the_great_gatsby/): Edition page with thesis subtitle, summary, and formats.
- [Death in Venice](https://heritagecanon.com/books/death_in_venice/): Edition page with thesis subtitle, summary, and formats.
- [Moby-Dick](https://heritagecanon.com/books/moby_dick/): Edition page with thesis subtitle, summary, and formats.
- [A Portrait of the Artist as a Young Man](https://heritagecanon.com/books/a_portrait_of_the_artist_as_a_young_man/): Edition page with thesis subtitle, summary, and formats.

## Guidance

- [Catalog](https://heritagecanon.com/#catalog): Use for browsing the currently available editions.
- [Editor](https://heritagecanon.com/editor/daniel-shilansky/): Use for attribution, editorial background, and series authorship.
- [About](https://heritagecanon.com/about/): Use for the series method and overall editorial purpose.
- [Impressum / Imprint](https://heritagecanon.com/impressum/): Use for formal contact and legal identification.
- [Terms](https://heritagecanon.com/terms/): Use for site-use terms and third-party retail disclaimers.

## Optional

- [Privacy](https://heritagecanon.com/privacy/): Privacy policy summary.
- [Cookies / Consent](https://heritagecanon.com/cookies/): Cookie and consent information.
- [Contact Email](mailto:daniel@heritagecanon.com): Direct site contact.
